content.text:
The file looks correct. All changes have been applied properly.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1 (TextVariants → ContentVariants)** — **Applied.**
   - Line 4: Replaced `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants` in the import from `@patternfly/react-core`.
   - Lines 11, 14, 17: Replaced `TextVariants.h4` with `ContentVariants.h4` in JSX (member `h4` maps directly to `h4`).

2. **Fix 2 (Text → Content)** — **Applied.**
   - Line 4: Replaced `Text` with `Content` in the import from `@patternfly/react-core`. Reordered imports alphabetically (`Content, ContentVariants, GridItem`).
   - Lines 11, 14, 17: Replaced `<Text component={...}>...</Text>` with `<Content component={...}>...</Content>`. The `component` prop maps directly to `Content.component`, so no prop changes were needed.
